---
title: ""
page-layout: full
body-classes: home-page
format:
  html:
    css: styles.css
    toc: false
---

<div class="hero">
<div class="hero-card">
<img src="profile.jpg" class="profile-image" alt="Khyati Parihar">

<p class="tag">Data • Analytics • Gen AI</p>

<h1>Khyati Parihar</h1>

<p class="subtitle">
I build clear, thoughtful work around data, experimentation, and analysis.
</p>

<div class="hero-buttons">
<a href="resume.html" class="btn-primary">View Resume</a>
<a href="blogs.html" class="btn-secondary">Read Blogs</a>
<a href="https://www.linkedin.com/in/khyati-parihar-961283174/" class="btn-icon" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer" aria-label="LinkedIn">
<i class="bi bi-linkedin"></i>
</a>
<a href="https://github.com/rsm-kparihar" class="btn-icon" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer" aria-label="GitHub">
<i class="bi bi-github"></i>
</a>
</div>
</div>
</div>

## About Me

<div class="info-grid">
<div class="info-card">
<h3>What I Did</h3>
<p>My work has included developing ML-driven pipelines, working with data-intensive systems, and exploring how large language models can support automation, insight generation, and better decision-making.</p>
</div>

<div class="info-card">
<h3>What I Do</h3>
<p>I build machine learning and GenAI solutions that turn unstructured data into usable systems, with a focus on practical deployment, experimentation, and measurable impact.</p>
</div>

<div class="info-card">
<h3>What I Want To Do</h3>
<p>I am especially interested in GenAI, LLM applications, retrieval systems, and production-grade ML engineering that connects model capability with real-world usability.</p>
</div>
</div>

## Featured Sections

<div class="feature-row">
<a href="resume.html" class="feature-card">
<h3>Resume</h3>
<p>See my background, skills, and experience.</p>
</a>

<a href="blogs.html" class="feature-card">
<h3>Blogs</h3>
<p>Read short pieces on analysis, statistics, and data thinking.</p>
</a>

<a href="mailto:khyatiparihar@gmail.com" class="feature-card" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">
<h3>Let's chat!</h3>
<p>khyatiparihar@gmail.com</p>
</a>
</div>
